allow: Bash(git -c 'user.name=Claude Code' -c user.email=noreply@anthropic.com commit -q -m 'perf\(build\): keep heavy lib chunks lazy + verify chunk graph *)
Bash(git -c 'user.name=Claude Code' -c user.email=noreply@anthropic.com commit -q -m 'chore: add .gitattributes to normalize line endings \(LF\) *)

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(d\);const w={};let total=0;for\(const f of r\)for\(const m of f.messages\){if\(m.severity===1\){w[m.ruleId]=\(w[m.ruleId]||0\)+1;total++}}console.log\('total warnings:',total\);Object.entries\(w\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>b[1]-a[1]\).forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>console.log\(String\(v\).padStart\(4\),k\)\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(d\);const w={};let t=0;for\(const f of r\)for\(const m of f.messages\)if\(m.severity===1\){w[m.ruleId]=\(w[m.ruleId]||0\)+1;t++}console.log\('total warnings:',t\);Object.entries\(w\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>b[1]-a[1]\).forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>console.log\(String\(v\).padStart\(4\),k\)\)}\)")
Bash(git -c 'user.name=Claude Code' -c user.email=noreply@anthropic.com commit -q -m 'chore\(lint\): auto-remove unused imports; report remaining warnings *)
